restriction.android:title: Maximum gesture authentication attempts
restriction.android:description: Number of failed gesture attempts before lockout. Range: 1–10.

restriction.android:title: Require SAS verification
restriction.android:description: When enabled, exchanges cannot complete without SAS code confirmation.

restriction.android:title: Disable encrypted backup
restriction.android:description: Hides and blocks the backup/restore feature.

restriction.android:title: Audit log retention (days)
restriction.android:description: Number of days to keep exchange audit records. 0 = keep forever.

restriction.android:title: Disable Tor/Orbot proxy
restriction.android:description: Hides the Tor anonymisation toggle and prevents proxy use.

restriction.android:title: Enforce PIN lock before exchange
restriction.android:description: Requires the user to re-authenticate with device PIN before each exchange.

restriction.android:title: Pre-fill display name
restriction.android:description: User's full name pre-populated from the corporate directory.

restriction.android:title: Pre-fill email
restriction.android:description: User's work email pre-populated from the corporate directory.

restriction.android:title: Pre-fill profile type
restriction.android:description: Profile type: WORK or PERSONAL. Default: WORK for managed devices.
